_comment: Mission script for autopilot.py (--mission). An EDITABLE list of steps the autopilot flies in
order, handing control over once you press 'm' on io_bridge (any flight key aborts).
"<recipe>"                       -> play a flight_playbook.json recipe to completion
"ascend_until_ceiling"           -> hold the ascend preset until the flow detector reports CEILING
"forward_until_wall"             -> reset attitude, then hold the forward preset until the detector reports WALL
{"rest": N}                      -> hold neutral for N seconds
{"<field>": v, "duration_s": N} -> hold the given control fields for N seconds (inline step)
rest_between_s : auto-inserted neutral pause between consecutive NON-rest steps (default settle).
max_contact_s : SAFETY — if an until-contact step doesn't fire within this many seconds, the whole
mission aborts to HOLD (reported as a non-detection, NEVER as a contact).
This default = arm -> controlled takeoff -> settle 3s -> climb to the ceiling -> turn right ->
forward into a wall -> turn left -> forward into a wall. Turn angle is approximate (not yet
calibrated). Add a "back_off" after a "forward_until_wall" if you don't want it to sit at the wall.
